narrative:
Precinct Good Hope (precinct in Hocking County) has 898 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
